expectations.text: the agent should read .agents/skills/marketplace-health/SKILL.md before answering the drift check, since the skill defines the 4 audit dimensions
expectations.evidence: agent did not read or invoke any skill

expectations.text: the report should contain zero HIGH-severity drift findings (broken cross-references, manifest drift, doc-code mismatch)
expectations.evidence: structure assertion without compare_args falls back to LLM judge

expectations.text: the agent should specifically check the cross-reference-integrity and docs-reflect-state dimensions (the 'drift' framing maps to those two dimensions per the skill)
expectations.evidence: The agent did not specifically check cross-reference-integrity or docs-reflect-state dimensions; its assessment focused on eval completeness rather than drift dimensions per the skill.

expectations.text: the agent should run python .agents/skills/marketplace-health/scripts/health_check.py (or equivalent) rather than improvising its own drift check
expectations.evidence: The agent did not run the health_check.py script or any equivalent prescribed script; it performed its own file exploration and manual analysis instead.

expectations.text: the response should list any MEDIUM/LOW drift findings (stale doc refs, missing CHANGELOG entries) with file paths and remediation
expectations.evidence: The agent's response does not list any MEDIUM/LOW drift findings with file paths and remediation; it only reports that the evaluation is incomplete.
